en: Oh, no. Oh, great plan so far. Oh, my God.
Lewis, get Becky. Well, if we don't know the code, this is gonna turn into an alarm in 60 seconds.
ko: 아, 지금까지는 좋은 계획이야. 오, 세상에.

en: Becky, put Jules on. She put me on hold. What is wrong with that girl?
ko: 그녀가 나를 대기 상태로 두었어. 그 여자 뭐가 문제야?

en: This is so not good. What are we supposed to do, Ben? Stop eating.
Go to the computer. Right now. Go, go, go. Go. Separately.
Separately. Ben, Ben, you there? Becky, don't screw around. Put Jules on. It's an emergency.
She's in a meeting. Interrupt her. Ben, what's up?
ko: 베키, 장난치지 마. 줄스를 바꿔줘. 긴급 상황이야.

en: Jules, your mother has an alarm. No, she doesn't. Yes, she does.
I'm in her kitchen. It's about to go off. What's the code? I have no idea. Ben, listen to me.
I know this woman. That is a fake alarm that she bought off of some infomercial or something. Okay?
ko: 나는 이 여자를 알아. 그건 가짜 알람이야

en: It's not real. It's not connected. It's just to scare off burglars. She says it's fake.
It's just to scare off burglars. Oh, well, it's doing a good job.
Listen, my parents would never pay for an alarm, okay? They're the cheapest people in America.
Okay, well, it hasn't turned into an alarm yet. It's still beeping.
That's because it's a fake. Trust me on this one. Have you found the computer? It's not down here.
